claims.claim: Since 2006, Instinctive Choice has been a feline favorite, making every mealtime an occasion.
This premium canned cat food is renowned for its balanced nutrition and delectable flavors, ensuring your cat gets a diet that's as yummy as it is healthy.
At Instinctive Choice, our commitment to crafting the perfect meal begins with high-quality proteins.
claims.evidence: Starting with high-quality proteins, this recipe features a succulent blend of chicken, turkey, and trout.

claims.claim: We believe in providing cats with a blend of succulent chicken, turkey, and trout, simmered in rich chicken broth for an irresistible aroma and gourmet flavor that cats instinctively crave.
claims.evidence: Starting with high-quality proteins, this recipe features a succulent blend of chicken, turkey, and trout. These premium ingredients are simmered to perfection in a rich chicken broth, creating an irresistible aroma and gourmet flavor cats instinctively crave.

claims.claim: Our philosophy is centered around ensuring your cat's meals are not only delicious but also nutritionally balanced to support their overall health.

claims.evidence: Starting with high-quality proteins, this recipe features a succulent blend of chicken, turkey, and trout.

claims.claim: **Chicken Broth:** Rich in flavor and nutrients.
claims.evidence: These premium ingredients are simmered to perfection in a rich chicken broth, creating an irresistible aroma and gourmet flavor cats instinctively crave.

claims.claim: **Salmon Oil (Preserved With Mixed Tocopherols):** Provides essential omega-6 and omega-3 fatty acids for skin and coat health.
claims.evidence: Salmon Oil (Preserved With Mixed Tocopherols), Natural Flavor, Agar-Agar, Potassium Chloride, Taurine, Choline Chloride, Magnesium Proteinate, Salt, Inulin, Vitamin E Supplement, Zinc Proteinate, Iron Proteinate, Copper Proteinate, Thiamine Mononitrate, Niacin Supplement, Manganese Proteinate, d-Calcium Pantothenate, Sodium Selenite, Vitamin A Supplement, Riboflavin Supplement, Vitamin B12 Supplement, Pyridoxine Hydrochloride, Biotin, Folic Acid, Calcium Iodate, Vitamin D3 Supplement.

claims.claim: **Natural Flavor:** Adds a natural taste that cats love.
Our moisture content is crafted with added moisture to ensure your cat stays well-hydrated, happy, and in tip-top shape through all life stages.
claims.evidence: We understand hydration is crucial for your cat's urinary health. That's why Instinctive Choice is crafted with added moisture, ensuring your furry friend stays well-hydrated, happy, and in tip-top shape through all life stages.

claims.claim: Our texture is soft pate-style to guarantee content purrs and clean bowls.
**Guaranteed Analysis:** Meets AAFCO Cat Food Nutrient Profiles for all life stages.
claims.evidence: Formulated to meet the nutritional levels established by the AAFCO Cat Food Nutrient Profiles for all life stages.

claims.claim: Perfect for cats who are selective about their food.

claims.evidence: We understand hydration is crucial for your cat's urinary health. That's why Instinctive Choice is crafted with added moisture, ensuring your furry friend stays well-hydrated, happy, and in tip-top shape through all life stages.

claims.claim: Suitable for adult cats, kittens, and pregnant/lactating females.
claims.evidence: For adult cats, feed 1 to 1 1/4 cans per 6-8 lbs. of body weight per day. Kittens require up to two and a half times this amount. For pregnant and lactating females, allow free access to food.
